<!--
Copyright (c) 2026 qbitOS / ugrad.ai. All rights reserved.
SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0
Source: https://github.com/qbitOS/qbitos-prefix-engine
Provenance: baseline-cross-implementation-seed
-->

# qbitos{prefix-engine}

Rust T5-native structural classifier (11 symbols, 59 languages).

## Compliance Root

- Canonical policy: `https://github.com/qbitOS/compliance`
- Canonical policy URL: https://github.com/qbitOS/compliance

## Cross-Implementation Path

`DAC -> Iron Line -> Prefixes -> Quantum Gutter -> .qbit -> preflight`

## Control Envelope

`DAC/Prefix/Steno/Iron-Line/Preflight/search-history controls`

## Integration Targets

- `qbitos-quantum-prefixes`
- `qbitos-dac`
- `qbitos-steno`
- `qbitos-preflight`
- `qbit`
